steps.title: Read a point from the original line
steps.content: From the graph of dataset P, the line of best fit passes through approximately (100, 14).

steps.title: Transform the point and test the choices
steps.content:
When 540 units are added to each x-value to create dataset Q, the point (100, 14) becomes (640, 14). Adding a constant to all x-values shifts the line horizontally without changing its slope, so the Q line must pass through the transformed point (640, 14).

Test choice A at this point:
$$y = -3 + \frac{35}{1301}(640) = -3 + \frac{22400}{1301}$$
Since $1301 \times 17 = 22117$, we have $\frac{22400}{1301} \approx 17.22$, giving $y \approx -3 + 17.22 \approx 14.22 \approx 14$ ✓

This confirms (640, 14) lies on the line. That matches choice A — A is correct.
